subcodes.first_line: O thou who art thirsty for the Salsabil of Divine Bestowals! The acquirement of a part of the Gifts and Graces of God depends upon ability, worthiness and capability.
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @knowledge; recognition of God, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @thankfulness; gratitude
